headline: Professional Esports Athlete | Overwatch 2
summary:
Pursue what excites you, set ambitious goals, work hard to achieve them, and inspire others along the way. These principles guide me in life, shaping how I navigate challenges and opportunities.

Beyond eSports, I’m interested in computer engineering, hardware, and high-performance technologies. I enjoy exploring how precision, quality, and optimization can elevate performance - not just in machines but in humans too. I firmly believe that with the right mindset, consistent effort, and a commitment to growth, anything is achievable.

experiences.title: Professional Esports Athlete
experiences.description: Competing in the Esports Title Overwatch 2. Playing in Europe’s highest Leagues and participating in international Tournaments.

experiences.title: Software Engineer Intern
experiences.description: Developed a C++ prototype for OpenRGB to detect their keyboards and control lighting effects, communicating via Protocol Buffers over a CDC ACM connection.

experiences.title: Civil Servant
experiences.description: Supported high-risk teenagers navigate towards societal integration, by helping them regain perspective and develop essential life skills.

experiences.title: Software Engineer Intern
experiences.description: Developed scripts for internal tools and configured a Linux server environment for hosting and deployment using C# and SQL.

experiences.title: Technical Support Intern
experiences.description: Coordinated customer requests with technicians, provided remote tech support, assisted with repairs and personalized advice in a service shop.

education.degree_name: Bachelor of Applied Science - BASc, Business Informatics
